# PF & Co Construction
> AI-powered structural engineering, construction, and site intelligence services across Surrey, London, and the South East of England.

## About
PF & Co Construction is an engineering-led construction firm specialising in structural design, precision construction, and data-driven site intelligence. We combine AI-optimised design tools with hands-on engineering expertise to deliver safer, faster, and more cost-effective outcomes. PI insured, with 24-hour turnaround on quotes.

## Services

### Structural Engineering
Residential and commercial structural design, beam calculations (RSJ/steel), basement impact assessments, and load-bearing wall removals.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/structural-engineering

### Construction
Engineering-led construction services including structural alterations, extensions, loft conversions, and basement builds.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/construction

### Site Intelligence
Data-driven pre-construction screening reports interrogating 15+ authoritative data sources. Reports include:
- Site Feasibility Report (£1,500)
- Geotechnical Desk Study (£900)
- Flood Risk Assessment (£375)
- Planning Statement (£900)
- Heritage Impact Assessment (£725)
- Design & Access Statement (£600)
- Transport Statement (£600)
- Sustainability / Energy Statement (£550)
- CIL Liability Assessment (£500)
- Construction Management Plan (£425)
- Party Wall Pre-Assessment (£425)
- Pre-Construction Design Review (£425)
- Parking Provision Statement (£375)
- Biodiversity Net Gain Screening (£300)
- Concept Feasibility Study (£1,200)
- Pre-Application Advice Pack (£1,100)
- BC Readiness Check (£150)
- Full Site Intelligence Bundle (£2,375)
All prices are Early Access pricing (approximately 40% off RRP). Prices exclude VAT.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/site-intelligence
Order: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/order-report
Sample reports (illustrative PDFs with fictional data) are available for every product:
  https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/samples/{slug}-sample.pdf
  Slugs: site-feasibility, geotechnical-desk-study, flood-risk-assessment, biodiversity-net-gain, construction-management-plan, design-and-access-statement, energy-statement, feasibility-study, heritage-impact-assessment, parking-survey, planning-statement, transport-statement, pre-construction-design-review, pre-application-advice, cil-liability-assessment, party-wall-assessment, building-control, full-bundle

### Report Packages
Pre-construction diligence bundles at additional savings:
- Pre-Planning Pack (4 reports): £3,025
- Triple Threat (3 reports): £2,375
- Site Acquisition Pack (5 reports): £2,900
- Architect Support Pack (5 reports): £2,625
- Self-Build Starter (4 reports): £3,050
- Land Buyer Screening (5 reports): £3,500
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/report-packages

### AI Innovation
AI-powered structural design tools that optimise safety and reduce material waste.
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/ai-innovation

### Subscriptions
Engineering as a Service — structural calculations and priority design support for a fixed monthly fee.
- Starter: £595/mo
- Professional: £1,495/mo
- Enterprise: £2,995/mo
URL: https://www.pfcoconstruction.co.uk/subscriptions
